text:
YouTube prankster Daniel Jarvis, popularly known as 'Jarvo 69', infiltrated the Paris Olympics closing ceremony disguised as a Team GB member.

Jarvis posted a video of himself at the closing ceremony, donning one of Team GB's distinctive Hawaiian shirts uniform adorned with emblems of every nartion across Great Britain and Northern Ireland.

Having secured a shirt that matched those worn by the British athletes, Jarvis sneaked his way into the Stade de France alongside the athletes. On social media, Jarvis boasted: "Yes I blagged my way into the Olympics closing ceremony, dressed as a @TeamGB athlete! I miss the Olympic".

Not stopping there, Jarvis even uploaded a selfie from the ceremony featuring none other than French president Emmanuel Macron, posting: "Me and Macron after sneaking into the Olympics!!!"

His video attracted nearly 300k views within just three hours. Comments flooded in, with one stunned user exclaiming: "No freaking way, it's Jarvo again!!! He was a menace in cricket and football and now he strikes Olympics too wtf!"

Another replied: "Jarvo strikes at the Olympics, someone just hand him over a gold medal only for trespassing!"

Jarvis has carried out a number of similar stunts at high-profile sporting events, including taking credit for an incident in which sex noises interrupted theBBC's live broadcast of an FA Cup match betweenLiverpooland Wolves.

The prankster also crashed the Euro 2024 draw, dressed up as a New Zealand rugby player during the national anthems at the Principality Stadium before their game against Wales, and gatecrashed Real Madrid's 2022 Champions League final victory celebrations on the pitch.

Jarvis was found guilty of aggravated trespass in 2022 after he invaded the pitch during the fourth Test between England and India at the Oval. This marked his third interruption during the series, colliding with England cricketer Jonny Bairstow while trying to bowl at Ollie Pope.

Jarvis was handed a suspended sentence after being charged and found guilty of aggravated trespass.

title: Olympics security breach as prankster behind MOTD sex noise stunt sneaks into ceremony | Other | Sport | Express.co.uk
author: Matthew Cooper
description: YouTube prankster Daniel Jarvis snuck his way into the Olympics closing ceremony.
